filesModified.purpose: Added grid layout and gap-gap-5 to charcoal background wrapper, added gap-gap-4 to archive-inner for spacing between filters/results
Synced charcoal background wrapper grid layout and gap-gap-5 to match PHP
Fixed dark mode pagination: current page was black text on black background, changed to white bg with charcoal text
Recreated main archive icon following block icon guidelines (proper header, archive grid with header and filter bar)
Recreated blog post variation icon following block icon guidelines (proper header, image + text cards)
Recreated team member variation icon - removed circles and white fills, replaced with rectangular shapes using currentColor only
Recreated resource variation icon - removed strokes and rounded corners (rx), replaced with filled path cutouts for card outlines
Recreated testimonial variation icon - removed strokes and white color, replaced with filled rectangles and path cutouts using currentColor
Recreated policy variation icon - removed strokes and rounded corners (rx), replaced with filled path cutouts for document card outlines

warnings: Entrypoint size limit: js/editor (309 KiB), js/screen (341 KiB)

syncStatus.notes: PHP and TSX both have matching grid grid-cols-1 gap-gap-5 on charcoal background wrapper

fixesApplied.issue: Issue 1: Black text on black background
fixesApplied.description: Pagination .page-numbers.current in dark mode had black text (text-black) on black background (bg-black). Fixed in navigation.css by changing dark mode current page to white background with charcoal text ([&.current]:dark:bg-white [&.current]:dark:border-white [&.current]:dark:text-charcoal).

fixesApplied.issue: Issue 2: Missing spacing between heading, filters, and grid
fixesApplied.description: Added grid grid-cols-1 gap-gap-5 to the charcoal background wrapper div (containing ThemeHeading and archive-inner) in both PHP and TSX. Added grid grid-cols-1 gap-gap-4 to archive-inner div in PHP for spacing between filters, loading spinner, and results grid.

fixesApplied.issue: Issue 3: Block icons not following guidelines
fixesApplied.description: Recreated all 6 SVG icons to follow block icon guidelines. Fixed violations: ArchiveTeamMember.svg had circles and white fills; ArchiveResource.svg had strokes and rounded corners (rx); ArchiveTestimonial.svg had strokes and white color; ArchivePolicy.svg had strokes and rounded corners (rx). All icons now use: 24x24 viewBox, integer coordinates only, no rounded corners, no strokes, currentColor fill only, path cutouts for outlines.
